mapper.select: SELECT e.enrollment_id, e.user_id, e.course_id, e.enrollment_status, e.completion_rate, e.enrollment_dt, e.completion_dt, e.reg_dt, e.upd_dt, u.user_nm, c.course_nm FROM tb_enrollment e LEFT JOIN tb_user u ON e.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN tb_course c ON e.course_id = c.course_id WHERE e.enrollment_id = #{enrollmentId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_enrollment (enrollment_id, user_id, course_id, enrollment_status, completion_rate, enrollment_dt, reg_dt, upd_dt) VALUES (#{enrollmentId}, #{userId}, #{courseId}, #{enrollmentStatus}, #{completionRate}, #{enrollmentDt}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_enrollment SET enrollment_status = #{enrollmentStatus}, completion_rate = #{completionRate}, completion_dt = #{completionDt}, upd_dt = NOW() WHERE enrollment_id = #{enrollmentId}
mapper.select: SELECT e.enrollment_id, e.user_id, e.course_id, e.enrollment_status, e.completion_rate, e.enrollment_dt, e.completion_dt, e.reg_dt, e.upd_dt, u.user_nm, c.course_nm FROM tb_enrollment e LEFT JOIN tb_user u ON e.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN tb_course c ON e.course_id = c.course_id WHERE e.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY e.enrollment_dt DESC

SELECT e.enrollment_id, e.user_id, e.course_id, e.enrollment_status, e.completion_rate, e.enrollment_dt, e.completion_dt, e.reg_dt, e.upd_dt, u.user_nm, c.course_nm FROM tb_enrollment e LEFT JOIN tb_user u ON e.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN tb_course c ON e.course_id = c.course_id WHERE e.course_id = #{courseId} ORDER BY e.enrollment_dt DESC
